title: Display Containers
description: Display blocks inside Barrels, Cauldrons, Composters and Hoppers
body:
# Display Containers

This Datapack allows you to display (almost) any block inside a Barrel, Cauldron, Composter or Hopper! Just stand on top of the container, crouch jump and place the block!

### This datapack does NOT require a resourcepack! It is 100% Vanilla!

#### Found any bugs? Contact me on Discord (yoavtc)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/iKZLYumALfU?si=EwD1WzjOCiObkDqs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
